author: harjeb
text: Implemented support/benchmark_3x3_schemes.cpp to run doc schemes A-E against five valid 9R demo boards. Verified with MSYS2 g++ because cmake and msbuild are unavailable. Current results: A/B/C/E solve near-complete boards; D solves only easiest within limits; scattered/harder boards time out or A prototype blocks due missing full 15-puzzle macro handling.

author: harjeb
text: Verification commands: (1) PATH prepended with C:/msys64/ucrt64/bin, g++ -std=c++14 -O2 support/benchmark_3x3_schemes.cpp -o build/benchmark_3x3_schemes.exe; build/benchmark_3x3_schemes.exe passed and produced A-E timing results. (2) Existing core test g++ -std=c++14 -O2 -Iinclude support/test.cpp src/pazusoba.cpp -o build/test_pazusoba.exe compiled but failed at support/test.cpp:346; no core files were changed.

author: harjeb
text: Updated benchmark demos to valid boards with exactly 9 R orbs and no horizontal/vertical 3-match for any color. Added runtime validation has_initial_line3(). Raised B/C/D/E per-scheme search limits to 10s. Results: only C beam solved one legal board (cost 11) in 21 steps / 7448.6ms; A prototype failed on blank path blocking; B A* timed out; D GRASP failed; E timed out then A fallback failed.

author: harjeb
text: Applied repair doc to support/benchmark_3x3_schemes.cpp: A now uses joint BFS for single/two-orb placement and tries ranked candidate windows; B/C/E use fixed target heuristics, binary target/non-target state keys, finger-term scoring, and weighted A* w=2.5; D uses fixed scoring but remains a weak baseline. Rerun on five no-line3 legal boards with 10s limits: A 5/5 OK (1.26-4.69ms, 53-104 steps), B 5/5 OK (8.0-484.8ms, 19-35 steps), C 5/5 OK (245-1139ms), D 0/5, E 5/5 OK via weighted A* (8.2-492.1ms).

author: harjeb
text: Implemented route replay validation and random stress testing in support/benchmark_3x3_schemes.cpp. SearchResult now carries start + route; successful A/B/C/D/E demo results are replayed from input and checked for bounds, adjacency, final-board equality, and has_3x3(). Added --stress N and --stress-only CLI. Full verification: g++ build passed; fixed demos passed; --stress 1000 --stress-only passed with no initial line3 boards: A 1000/1000 avg 3.40ms, B 1000/1000 avg 75.58ms with 2s limit, C 1000/1000 avg 366.996ms with 2s limit.

author: harjeb
text: 已开始实现新增 6 种模式：blocked、7x6 验证、connected_orb 颜色过滤、target_combo 颜色权重、shape_template/shape_solver 覆盖 cross/row/column。

author: harjeb
text: 验证通过：g++ -std=c++14 -O2 -Iinclude support\\test_six_modes.cpp src\\pazusoba.cpp src\\shape_solver.cpp；运行 build\\test_six_modes.exe 通过。原有 support\\test.cpp 回归同样通过。

author: harjeb
text: 实现完成：颜色优先使用 bool orbs[ORB_COUNT] 掩码，支持多个颜色（如 R+G）；shape_request.colors 同样支持多颜色 only/prefer。
